title: NOT EXISTS doesn't play well together with other FILTER clauses
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_types (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, type_uri TEXT NOT NULL, subclass_of TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_types (id, type_uri, subclass_of) VALUES (1, 'http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Person', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_types (id, type_uri, subclass_of) VALUES (2, 'http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Politician', 'http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Person');
SELECT t1.type_uri, t2.subclass_of FROM test_types t1 JOIN test_types t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_types t3 WHERE t3.subclass_of = t1.type_uri);
SELECT type_uri FROM test_types WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_types WHERE subclass_of = type_uri) AND type_uri LIKE 'http://dbpedia.org/ontology/%';
key_bug_features: NOT EXISTS with other FILTER clauses in queries
